features.title: Why Choose PDFOrca?
features.subtitle: We combine cutting-edge technology with user-centric design to deliver the best PDF processing experience.

security.title: Military-Grade Security
security.description: All files are automatically deleted after processing. We use end-to-end encryption and never store your documents.

speed.title: Blazing Fast Processing
speed.description: Leverage parallel processing and WebAssembly for ultra-fast PDF operations. Process large files in seconds.

ai.title: AI-Powered Features
ai.description: Use AI to summarize PDFs, extract key points, generate titles, and more. Powered by advanced language models.

multilingual.title: Multi-Language Support
multilingual.description: Full support for English and Hindi, with more languages coming soon. Optimized for regional search keywords.

browser.title: Browser Processing
browser.description: Process files directly in your browser for maximum privacy. No server upload required for basic operations.

parallel.title: Parallel Processing
parallel.description: Use Web Workers and serverless functions to process multiple files simultaneously. No queues, no waiting.

batch.title: Batch Processing
batch.description: Process up to 10 files at once. Merge, convert, or compress multiple documents simultaneously — save time on every task.

no_signup.title: No Registration Required
no_signup.description: Use every tool instantly without creating an account. No sign-up walls, no email verification — just upload and go.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

q1.question: Is PDFOrca free to use?
q1.answer: Yes! All basic PDF tools are completely free. We offer premium features for advanced needs.

q2.question: Are my files secure?
q2.answer: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption and automatically delete files after 1 hour.

q3.question: What file sizes are supported?
q3.answer: We support files up to 100MB for free users and up to 2GB for premium users.

q4.question: Do I need to install any software?
q4.answer: No installation required. PDFOrca works entirely in your browser.

q5.question: Can I use it on mobile?
q5.answer: Yes! Our website is fully responsive and works perfectly on all mobile devices.

q6.question: How fast is the processing?
q6.answer: Most operations complete in under 2 seconds for average-sized files. We use parallel processing, Web Workers, and optimized algorithms for maximum speed.

q7.question: What PDF tools do you offer?
q7.answer: We offer 14+ tools including merge, split, compress, convert (PDF to Word, Excel, PPT, JPG), rotate, protect, unlock, watermark, page numbering, organize, and AI-powered summarization.

q8.question: Do you have an API for developers?
q8.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive REST API for developers. You can integrate our PDF processing capabilities directly into your applications with detailed documentation and SDKs.

faq.subtitle: Get answers to common questions about PDFOrca.

about.title: About PDFOrca
about.description: Learn about our mission, team, and commitment to providing the best PDF tools.
about.hero_description: PDFOrca was founded with a simple mission: to make PDF processing accessible, secure, and effortless for everyone. No complicated software, no privacy concerns, just powerful tools that work right in your browser.
about.mission_text: To democratize PDF processing by providing free, high-quality tools that anyone can use regardless of technical expertise. We believe everyone deserves access to professional-grade document tools without cost barriers.
about.values_privacy_text: Your documents never leave your browser
about.values_innovation_text: Constantly improving with AI and new features
about.team_subtitle: Passionate experts dedicated to improving your PDF experience
about.team_member_1_bio: Former Google engineer with 10+ years in document processing
about.team_member_2_bio: Product leader from Adobe with expertise in PDF technologies
about.team_member_3_bio: Full-stack developer specializing in browser-based processing
about.team_member_4_bio: Cybersecurity expert focused on data privacy and encryption
about.journey_subtitle: From a simple idea to serving millions worldwide
about.milestone_2020: Founded with a vision to simplify PDF processing
about.milestone_2021: Launched first 5 PDF tools with browser-based processing
about.milestone_2022: Reached 1 million users and added AI features
about.milestone_2023: Expanded to 14+ tools with multi-language support
about.milestone_2024: Achieved 5 million users with enterprise features
about.cta_description: Help us make PDF processing better for everyone

pricing_page.title: Pricing
pricing_page.description: Choose the plan that works best for you. All plans include our core PDF tools.
pricing_page.hero_description: Choose the perfect plan for your PDF needs. No hidden fees, no surprises. Start with our free plan or try Pro free for 14 days.
pricing_page.comparison_subtitle: See how our plans stack up against each other
pricing_page.faq_subtitle: Get answers to common questions about our pricing and plans
pricing_page.faq_1_q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
pricing_page.faq_1_a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your Pro/Business features will remain active until the end of your billing period.
pricing_page.faq_2_q: Is there a free trial for Pro plan?
pricing_page.faq_2_a: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial for the Pro plan. No credit card required to start the trial.
pricing_page.faq_3_q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing_page.faq_3_a: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for Business plans.
pricing_page.faq_4_q: Do you offer discounts for non-profits?
pricing_page.faq_4_a: Yes, we offer a 50% discount for registered non-profit organizations. Contact our sales team with your documentation.
pricing_page.faq_5_q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
pricing_page.faq_5_a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll be charged the prorated difference. When downgrading, changes take effect at the next billing cycle.
pricing_page.faq_6_a: Absolutely. All files are encrypted in transit and at rest. We automatically delete files after the retention period, and we never share your data with third parties.
pricing_page.cta_heading: Ready to Transform Your PDF Workflow?
pricing_page.cta_description: Join thousands of professionals who trust PDFOrca for their document needs.
pricing_page.cta_footer: No credit card required • 14-day free trial • Cancel anytime

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.description: Get in touch with our team. We're here to help.
contact_page.hero_description: Have questions, feedback, or need support? We're here to help you with all your PDF needs. Our team is ready to assist you.
contact_page.form_subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_page.message_placeholder: Please describe your inquiry in detail...
contact_page.about_text: PDFOrca is a leading online PDF solution trusted by millions of users worldwide. Our mission is to make PDF processing simple, secure, and accessible to everyone.
contact_page.response_time_value: Typically within 24 hours during business days
contact_page.faq_1_q: How long does it take to get a response?
contact_page.faq_1_a: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days. For urgent matters, please use our phone support.
contact_page.faq_2_a: Yes! We provide custom enterprise solutions for businesses with high-volume PDF processing needs. Contact our sales team for a demo.
contact_page.faq_3_q: Can I suggest a new feature?
contact_page.faq_3_a: Absolutely! We love hearing from our users. Please use the feedback form or email us directly with your suggestions.
contact_page.faq_4_q: Is there a limit to file size?
contact_page.faq_4_a: Our free tier supports files up to 100MB. For larger files, consider our premium plans or contact us for enterprise solutions.
contact_page.cta_description: Our support team is available to help you with any urgent matters.
contact_page.name: Name
contact_page.sent: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

settings_page.security_description: Change your password to keep your account secure
